const src = $('If Email Channel?').item.json;
return [{ json: { id: src.id, status: 'sent', sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_error: null } }];

const src = $('If Telegram Channel?').item.json;
return [{ json: { id: src.id, status: 'sent', sent_at: new Date().toISOString(), last_error: null } }];
